ingress.scope: All attached resources and public ingress rules for TCP 22, 2375, 3389, and 6443 across IPv4 and IPv6.
evidence: Internet-gateway paths to the attached administration interface were reported reachable for the assessed TCP services.

egress.scope: All attached resources and public IPv4 egress rules.
evidence: The attached administration interface had a default route through the internet gateway.

ingress.scope: All attached resources and public IPv4 ingress rules for TCP 3306, 5432, and 6379.
evidence: Separate IPv4 path analyses for all listed database ports found no route from the internet gateway to an attached interface.

egress.scope: All attached resources and public IPv4 egress rules.
evidence: NAT gateway and intermediary firewall evidence was not included in the review.

ingress.scope: All attached resources and public IPv4 ingress rules across every protocol and port.
evidence: A public ingress path from the internet gateway to an attached network interface was identified.

egress.scope: All attached resources and public IPv6 egress rules across every protocol and port.
evidence: A public egress path from the attached network interface to the internet gateway was identified.

ingress.scope: All attached resources and private IPv4 ingress rules.
evidence: The attached application interface was private and had no ingress path from an internet gateway.

egress.scope: All attached resources and private IPv4 egress rules.
evidence: The private subnet had no internet gateway or NAT gateway route.
